channel.title: UFO Sightings on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in UFO Sightings on Alien Truth Social

item.title: List of ufologists
item.description:
This Wikipedia article provides a categorized list of notable individuals identified as ufologists, defined as people who investigate whether unidentified flying objects are linked to extraterrestrial intelligence. The list is organized by country and features researchers, authors, and public figures involved in UFO studies, such as J. Allen Hynek, Jacques Vallée, and Stanton Friedman. The entry notes that the article relies heavily on primary sources and includes a wide range of individuals spanning from scientific researchers to public advocates and figures associated with various UFO-related claims.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_ufologists
